message:
fix(nats): replace ambient SystemTime with Cx entropy in random_suffix (bd-tznv)

- random_suffix() now takes &Cx and uses cx.random_u64() instead of
  SystemTime::now() + process::id(), preserving determinism in lab runtime
- Fix clippy warnings in h2_security and net_hardening test files
- Close bd-tznv, bd-e71n, bd-1bic, bd-qhai (all sub-tasks completed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
